title: Crypto intraday seasonality primary (time-of-day, ~22:00 UTC / Asia open)
source: quant-phd-advisor literature survey 2026-05-29 (intraday edges on FX/metals/crypto at H1). See project-no-edge-h4-primary-direct memory + hackathon plan.
why: Concentrated returns when crypto is one of few open venues (US-close / Asia-open re-entry). Two practitioner reproductions (Concretum, Quantpedia) gross Sharpe ~1.6, strengthening post-2020 (flow mechanism). Crypto only.
value_rationale: Edge-search for the hackathon competition book (H1, conservative vol-target). B0080 is the front-runner (best OOS evidence across all asset classes) and is spiked first.
scope: Primary: long/flat in documented UTC hours. Test: mean H1 return by hour-of-day (24) and hour-of-week (168) per coin; THEN apply mlquants debunk -- add hour-of-day fixed effects, confirm day-of-week effect VANISHES (it is a mirage). Keep only hour-of-day effects stable across pre/post-2022.
Assets: BTC/ETH/SOL. Caveat: gross Sharpe, regime-dependent (dies in bears), thin (2-3 hrs/day) so 5-day window variance high. Use as feature/filter with B0080, not standalone.
